authors: Katharina Tittel William Allen Pedro Ramaciotti a Sciences Po, médialab
raw_title: Flooding the Feed: The Politics of Social Media Sharing Among Defensive Publics
title_en: Flooding the Feed: The Politics of Social Media Sharing Among Defensive Publics
title_zh: 淹没信息流：防御性公众中社交媒体分享的政治学
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了当人们感到受到威胁时，如何在社交媒体上大量分享信息来保护自己的观点。它关注这种分享行为背后的政治动机和策略。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how people share information heavily on social media to defend their views when they feel threatened. It focuses on the political motives and strategies behind this sharing behavior.
research_direction_zh: 研究社交媒体上信息传播的政治动态，特别是当公众采取防御姿态时的分享模式及其对舆论形成的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the political dynamics of information dissemination on social media, particularly the sharing patterns when publics adopt defensive stances and their impact on opinion formation.
